title: VG UI-MAP planner contract (v1) — 5-field-per-node lock
description: Schema for the JSON code block embedded in UI-MAP.md (markdown wrapper, JSON inside ```json fence). Per D-15 every node MUST have 5 required fields: tag, classes, children_count_order, props_bound, text_content_static. Permissive on additional fields (planner may add notes, owner_wave_id for D-12a/b/e, owner_task_id for D-14). Validator: verify-uimap-schema.py walks tree and BLOCKs on any missing required field. Used by /vg:blueprint planner contract + /vg:build executor inject (D-12a) + drift validators (D-03 wave-scoped, D-12b per-wave, D-12e holistic via verify-ui-structure.py + visual-diff.py wrappers).

phase_id.description: Optional — phase id this UI-MAP belongs to.

classes.description: Field 2/5 — Key class names. For Tailwind: per-class entries (utility-bound semantics). For component libraries: BEM-style or component class names.

children_count_order.description: Field 3/5 — Child structure metadata. count = number of direct children; order = array of child node IDs (or descriptive labels) in render order.

props_bound.description: Field 4/5 — Data prop bindings. Map of prop name → source description (e.g. {'campaigns': 'state.campaigns', 'onClick': 'handleEdit'}). Empty {} if no props.

text_content_static.description: Field 5/5 — Static text content. null if dynamic (driven by props/state).

id.description: Optional — stable node id for cross-referencing in children_count_order.order.

owner_wave_id.description: Optional — wave that owns this node. Set by planner for D-12a/b wave-scoped diff. Format: 'wave-N' or descriptive label.

owner_task_id.description: Optional — task that owns this node. Set by planner for D-14 Haiku subtree extraction.
